title: Trad.Fi to Bring $650M in Equipment Finance Credit Onchain
summary: Trad.Fi is moving up to $650 million in equipment finance private credit onto the blockchain, targeting the trillion-dollar US market. This could make financing faster and more accessible for small businesses.
body:
Trad.Fi, an equipment finance platform, is planning to bring up to $650 million in equipment-finance private credit onto the blockchain. This move aims to streamline the lending process in a market currently dominated by paperwork and traditional methods.

The company is targeting the trillion-dollar US equipment finance market, which is still heavily reliant on manual processes. By moving these transactions onchain, Trad.Fi hopes to reduce inefficiencies and make financing more accessible for small businesses.

For everyday people, this could mean faster and more transparent financing options for equipment purchases. Small businesses, in particular, could benefit from reduced paperwork and quicker approval times, making it easier to acquire the tools they need to grow.

This initiative could also pave the way for more blockchain-based financial services in the future. Keep an eye on Trad.Fi's progress and any new partnerships they announce in the coming months.
